titleStmt.title: SII 15.115: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 115. (B.K. No. 101 of 1929-30.) MUTTAGI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab standing in the village chāvaḍi.

This is dated the 4th regnal year of the king, Vikṛiti, Pushya-paurṇimā, Thursday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, corresponding to 1170 A.D., December 24, Thursday, f.d.t. °11. The Saṁkrānti, however, did not occur on that day.

It states that at the request made by Chauḍiseṭṭi and Mahāpradhāna, Sēnādhipati, Hiriya-daṇḍanāyaka Kēśavadēvayya, the king restored the gift of the village Maṇiyūru in Hebbāḷu Twelve to the god Dakshiṇāmukha Chennakēśava of Muttage. The record gives the genealogy of the king who is stated to have been ruling from Modeganūr. The above Kēśava-daṇḍanāyaka who was first in the service of Sōvidēva's brother Maiḷugi, is stated to have deserted him on account of the ambitions tacties of the latter and helped the former in securing the kindom.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: This is engraved in continuation of No. 35 above, between lines 28 and
div.p:
© śrīmadaśēṣajagadbharabhūmiyanāraydu kāyaleṁdu vidhātraṁ kōmaḷabhujadiṁ paḍadana sāmānya� vīrarenipa kaḷacuri nṛparaṁ . śrī
matu kaḷacuri nṛpa cūḍāmaṇi hermmūḍidēvanuttamaputraṁ hēmavṛṣabhadhvajaṁ jaya dhāmaṁ bijjalanṛpālana suhṛtākālaṁ . Anavarataṁ bijjaladēva
nṛpaṁ tānasicayaprahāraṁgaḷanittu nilisuva saṁgrānudoḷadanta balavuḷḷa śatruvaṁ mitranu maṁ . kaḷacurivaṁśadādinṛparellarumuttama cakrava
rttigaḷbaḷikaṁ kelarsvabāhubalavillade maṁḍaḷikarkkaḷādarāṁ baḷayutanādeniṁnenage maṁḍaḷikatvamayuktaveṁdu dōrbbaḷadoḷī cakravartti sakaḷōrbbigavādanajēyaṁ
bijjalaṁ . v® . taleyaṁ lāḷana lāḷanakkucitavalleṁdeyde tāṁ koṁḍapaṁ taleyaṁ gauḷana gauḷana vyarasavaṁ pīrvvaṁta tāṁ pīrddapaṁ taleyaṁ mūḷana mūḷava prabhuva kīḷtaṁtetti seṁḍāḍuvaṁ
khaḷabhūpāḷakapāḷaka praḷaya kṛcchauryōjvalaṁ bijjalaṁ . kaṁ . birudina bīrada bijjala dharaṇīśana putranādicaritraṁ sthiracakravarttiyūdaṁ dharegellaṁ sōvidēvanudbhava bhāvaṁ .
bavaradoḷammi kāduvaribhūbhujaraṁ bhujaramya khaḍgadiṁdamiṟidagalcuvaṁ hareṇadiṁ raṇa diṁdidirāgi kādadōḍuvarene dēvatābhavanavaṁ vanavaṁ huguvaṁtu mā
ḍuvaṁ kavarade kāvanaṁjuvavarāyane rāyamurāri bhūbhujaṁ . Uragādhīśananugramaṁtra baladiṁdaṁ tūḷdidikkuṁjarōtkaramaṁ raṁhita siṁhanādade taguḷdākūrmma śailaṁgaḷaṁtaradiṁ nūṁ
ki rasātaḷakkasuraniṁ noyyalke tānaṁmadaṁtire tōḷōḷtaḷedaṁ mahīvaḷeyamaṁ śrī sōmabhūmīśvaraṁ . kaṁ . sōmanarēṁdrana yōgakṣēmamavanāraydanārataṁ māḍuva sarbbāmūtya
mahāmaṁtri śikhāmaṇi kēśavacamūpanuttamarūpaṁ . v® . dvāparadaṁdu gōvaḷiti gōpiyanaṁdana kaṁdanādaneṁbā paḷiyallamaṁ kaḷeyaleṁdu viśiṣṭa vaśiṣṭhagōtradā gōpati
nāyakaṁge supatibrate ballavabāyigaṁ magaṁ śrīpatiyūdaneṁdu jagaveṁbudu kēśavadaṁḍa nāthanaṁ . maiḷugidēvanīgaḷaparādhade goṁḍanaśēṣarājyamaṁ lōlateyiṁdavītana samī
padoḷiṁniralāgadeṁdu tāṁ hēḷade sōmabhūpatiyallige baṁdaḍe rājyavāytu sallī leyoḷeṁdaḍaccari samunnati kēśavadaṁḍanāthane . tōyadhi mudritākhiḷa dharitriyoḷuḷḷa samasta
dēśamaṁ svāyata vṛttadōrbbalade sādhisi kaṁṭakaraṁ kaḷalci tāṁ rāyamurāri bhūpatige rājyavanūrjitavāgi mūḍidaṁ śrīyuvatīśvarāṁśadavatāreda kēśavadaṁḍanāyakaṁ . kaṁ .
caṁḍabhujavijayi kēśavadaṁḍēśana sakaḷa śāśvataiśvarya śrīmaṁḍananene negaḷdaniḷā maṁḍaḷadoḷu cauḍiseṭṭi śiṣṭanidhānaṁ . svasti śrīmatu kaḷacuri kuḷatiḷaka bhujabala
cakravarttirāyamurāri sōyidēvaṁ modeganūra nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgayuttamirddu vaḍḍibyavahāra cauḍiseṭṭiya binnapadiṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēnā
dhipati hiriya daṁḍanāyakaṁ kēśavadēvayyaṁgaḷu biṁnapaṁ geyye svasti śrīmatkaḷacuri cakravartti rāyamurāri sōyidēvavarṣada nālkaneya vikṛti saṁvatsarada puṣyada
puṇnave brahaspativāraduttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁtiyalu habbāḷu haṁnneraḍaroḷaga maṇiya yūraṁ punarbbharaṇaṁ māḍi muttageya naḍuvaṇa dakṣiṇāmukha śrī ceṁnakēśavadēvargge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ koṭṭaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 15.115 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
